items.title: Marathon Recovery
items.situation: Training for the Wallkill half-marathon left tight calves and a nagging IT band.
items.outcome: A 90-minute sports session before race week loosened the stride — and a standing monthly slot since.

items.title: Date-Night Reset
items.situation: An anniversary with two busy schedules and no time to plan something special.
items.outcome: A side-by-side 90-minute couples massage with tea service became the easiest gift to repeat.

items.title: First-Trimester Calm
items.situation: Lower-back pressure and trouble settling at the end of a long week.
items.outcome: Certified side-lying prenatal work that finally felt safe and genuinely restful.

items.title: Desk-Bound No More
items.situation: Years of laptop work had locked up the neck and shoulders.
items.outcome: Focused deep-tissue work plus simple between-visit advice that actually stuck.

items.title: Bridal Glow
items.situation: A bride wanting calm, clear skin the week before the wedding.
items.outcome: A tailored signature facial — no surprises, no harsh peels, just glow.

items.title: On Her Feet All Day
items.situation: A nurse finishing twelve-hour shifts with aching, swollen feet.
items.outcome: Reflexology in the recliner lounge became the weekly reset that made the shifts bearable.
